description_long: This is a modern, single-seat fighter jet with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and sharply swept-back wings. The aircraft features a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a transparent canopy, and is equipped with visible external weaponry mounted under the wings. The wings are low-mounted with slight anhedral angles and are fitted with small wingtip missiles or pods. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers, forming a conventional tail design. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with the main gear under the wings and a nose gear under the forward fuselage. The jet engine is rear-mounted, with a prominent exhaust nozzle at the back.
description: A modern, single-seat fighter jet with swept-back low wings, external weaponry, and a forward-enclosed cockpit. Features a single vertical stabilizer and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and symmetrical low-mounted swept wings with visible underwing armaments.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, open cockpit canopy, underwing missiles, and the tricycle landing gear configuration.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizers, engine exhaust, and the symmetry of the wing-mounted weaponry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cockpit, swept-back wings, underwing armaments, and the rear engine placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept with slight anhedral angle and small wingtip pods or missiles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle, retractable, with one nose gear and two main gear units
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a transparent canopy
